canonical_title: A Logical Calculus of the Ideas Immanent in Nervous Activity

editorial.significance: First mathematical model of the neuron; the conceptual origin of neural networks.

canonical_title: As We May Think

editorial.significance: The memex vision; founding document of augmenting human intellect with machines.

canonical_title: A Mathematical Theory of Communication

editorial.significance: Created information theory; the quantitative substrate of all machine learning.

canonical_title: Computing Machinery and Intelligence

editorial.significance: Posed 'can machines think', proposed the imitation game; the field's founding question.

canonical_title: A Proposal for the Dartmouth Summer Research Project on Artificial Intelligence

editorial.authors: John McCarthy, Marvin Minsky, Nathaniel Rochester, Claude Shannon
editorial.significance: Coined 'artificial intelligence' and framed the research programme.

canonical_title: The Perceptron: A Probabilistic Model for Information Storage and Organization in the Brain

editorial.significance: First trainable neural classifier; launched learning machines and their first hype cycle.

canonical_title: Some Studies in Machine Learning Using the Game of Checkers

editorial.significance: Coined 'machine learning'; first self-improving game program.

canonical_title: Programs with Common Sense

editorial.significance: The Advice Taker; founding statement of logic-based AI and knowledge representation.

canonical_title: Man-Computer Symbiosis

editorial.significance: The augmentation-versus-automation agenda that still structures AI debates.

canonical_title: Steps Toward Artificial Intelligence

editorial.significance: Early synthesis of search, learning, and planning as the components of AI.

canonical_title: GPS: A Program That Simulates Human Thought

editorial.significance: General Problem Solver; means-ends analysis and the symbolic cognition paradigm.

canonical_title: Fuzzy Sets

editorial.significance: Founded fuzzy logic; a major non-probabilistic approach to reasoning under vagueness.

canonical_title: ELIZA: A Computer Program for the Study of Natural Language Communication

editorial.significance: First chatbot; revealed the human tendency to project understanding onto machines.

canonical_title: Some Philosophical Problems from the Standpoint of Artificial Intelligence

editorial.significance: Introduced the frame problem and situation calculus.

canonical_title: STRIPS: A New Approach to the Application of Theorem Proving to Problem Solving

editorial.authors: Richard E. Fikes, Nils J. Nilsson
editorial.significance: The planning formalism that dominated automated planning for decades.

canonical_title: Adaptation in Natural and Artificial Systems (foundational monograph)

editorial.significance: Genetic algorithms; evolution as a computational search paradigm.

canonical_title: Maximum Likelihood from Incomplete Data via the EM Algorithm

editorial.authors: Arthur Dempster, Nan Laird, Donald Rubin
editorial.significance: The EM algorithm; workhorse of latent-variable estimation.
editorial.venue: Journal of the Royal Statistical Society B

canonical_title: Minds, Brains, and Programs

editorial.significance: The Chinese Room argument; the canonical philosophical attack on strong AI.

canonical_title: Neocognitron: A Self-Organizing Neural Network Model

editorial.significance: The architectural ancestor of convolutional networks.

canonical_title: Neural Networks and Physical Systems with Emergent Collective Computational Abilities

editorial.significance: Hopfield networks; energy-based associative memory that revived the field (2024 Nobel).

canonical_title: Self-Organized Formation of Topologically Correct Feature Maps

editorial.significance: Self-organizing maps; unsupervised topology-preserving learning.

editorial.significance: Stochastic networks and unsupervised learning of internal representations.

editorial.significance: Made backpropagation the standard training algorithm; the engine of all deep learning.

canonical_title: Chudeng Jihe Panding Wenti yu Jixiehua Zhengming (初等几何判定问题与机械化证明, Decision Problem and Mechanization of Theorem-Proving in Elementary Geometry)

editorial.significance: An algebraic mechanization method that converts elementary-geometry theorems into polynomial equation systems solvable by computer, later known internationally as the Wu method, a founding work of mechanical theorem proving in China.

canonical_title: Lishu Yun he Lishu Yun Fashengqi (隶属云和隶属云发生器, Membership Clouds and Membership Cloud Generators)

editorial.significance: Introduces the cloud model for bidirectional transformation between qualitative concepts and quantitative values using expectation, entropy, and hyper-entropy, modeling the randomness and fuzziness of concepts.
editorial.venue: 计算机研究与发展 32(6) (Journal of Computer Research and Development)

canonical_title: Pingxing Xitong Fangfa yu Fuza Xitong de Guanli he Kongzhi (平行系统方法与复杂系统的管理和控制, Parallel System Methods for Management and Control of Complex Systems)

editorial.significance: Proposes the parallel systems approach in which computational models are treated as an alternative realization of a real complex system for management and control, underlying the later ACP methodology of artificial systems, computational experiments, and parallel execution.

canonical_title: Lei Nao Zhineng Yanjiu de Huigu yu Zhanwang (类脑智能研究的回顾与展望, Retrospect and Prospect of Brain-Inspired Intelligence Research)

editorial.significance: Reviews brain-inspired intelligence research across cognitive brain computational models, brain-inspired information processing, and intelligent robotics, and outlines future directions at the intersection of artificial intelligence and cognitive computation.
editorial.venue: 计算机学报 (Chinese Journal of Computers) 39(1):212-222

canonical_title: Rengong Zhineng Shidai de Zhidu Anpai yu Falu Guizhi (人工智能时代的制度安排与法律规制, Institutional Arrangements and Legal Regulation in the Era of Artificial Intelligence)

editorial.significance: Analyzes the legal and institutional challenges of AI including liability, legal personhood, and risk, and argues for forward-looking norms that balance promotion and regulation of AI development.
editorial.venue: 法律科学（西北政法大学学报）2017年第5期 (Science of Law)

canonical_title: Rengong Zhineng Lunli Wenti de Xianzhuang Fenxi yu Duice (人工智能伦理问题的现状分析与对策, Analysis of the Current State of AI Ethics Issues and Countermeasures)

editorial.significance: Surveys current AI ethics problems such as privacy leakage, information cocoons, and algorithmic bias, and proposes multi-dimensional governance countermeasures spanning norms, technology, and law.
editorial.venue: 中国科学院院刊 36(11):1270-1277 (Bulletin of the Chinese Academy of Sciences)

canonical_title: Rengong Zhineng Shidai Zhongguo Geren Xinxi Baohu Fa de Xuanze (人工智能时代中国个人信息保护法的选择, The Choice of China's Personal Information Protection Law in the AI Era)

editorial.significance: Argues that AI-era data practices require shifting regulatory focus from collection to use and responsibility from data subjects to controllers, drawing on GDPR and CCPA for biometric and automated-decision rules.
editorial.venue: 北京航空航天大学学报（社会科学版）(Journal of Beijing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Social Sciences Edition)

canonical_title: Shendu Xuexi zai Mubiao Shijue Jiance zhong de Yingyong Jinzhan yu Zhanwang (深度学习在目标视觉检测中的应用进展与展望, Advances and Perspectives on Applications of Deep Learning in Visual Object Detection)

editorial.significance: Reviews deep-learning methods for visual object detection, covering the detection pipeline, public datasets, R-CNN and single-shot detector families, and challenges and future directions.

canonical_title: Zhongwen Fenci Shi Nian Huigu (中文分词十年回顾, A Decade Review of Chinese Word Segmentation)

editorial.significance: Survey reviewing roughly ten years of Chinese word segmentation research after the first SIGHAN bakeoff, comparing rule-based and statistical learning approaches and the impact of out-of-vocabulary words.
editorial.venue: 中文信息学报 21(3) (Journal of Chinese Information Processing)

canonical_title: Jiyu N-Zuiduan Lujing Fangfa de Zhongwen Ciyu Cufen Moxing (基于N-最短路径方法的中文词语粗分模型, A Rough Chinese Word Segmentation Model Based on the N-Shortest-Path Method)

editorial.significance: Proposes an N-shortest-path method to generate candidate segmentations as a coarse segmentation stage for Chinese text.
editorial.venue: 中文信息学报 16(5) (Journal of Chinese Information Processing)

canonical_title: Jiyu Shengchengshi Duikang Wangluo de Lubang Renlian Biaoqing Shibie (基于生成式对抗网络的鲁棒人脸表情识别, Robust Facial Expression Recognition With Generative Adversarial Networks)

editorial.authors: 姚乃明、郭清沛、乔逢春、陈辉、王宏安
editorial.significance: A generative adversarial network approach to facial expression recognition aimed at robustness under varying conditions.

canonical_title: Jiyu Shengxue Tezheng Kongjian Feixianxing Liuxing Jiegou de Yuyin Shibie Shengxue Moxing (基于声学特征空间非线性流形结构的语音识别声学模型, Feature-Space Nonlinear-Manifold Acoustic Model for Speech Recognition)

editorial.authors: 张文林、牛铜、屈丹、李弼程、裴喜龙
editorial.significance: A speech recognition acoustic model that exploits the nonlinear manifold structure of the acoustic feature space.
